query: I need to hit the HeyGen API to generate a video. Let me check the docs for /v2/video/generate.
curl -X POST https://api.heygen.com/v3/video-agents -H 'X-Api-Key: sk_...' -d '{"prompt": "make a product demo"}'

Make a personalized outreach video for each lead in my CRM export.
